zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Gleason於大約1636年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福。她和Thomas Gleason至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1703年7月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sarah Gleason于大约1636年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福。她和Thomas Gleason至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1703年7月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gleason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Waterford): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Glasáin, from a diminutive of glas ‘green, blue, gray’.

variants.name: Glasheen
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Glaisín,based on a diminutive of glas ‘green, blue, gray’. Compare Gleason .

variants.name: Glisan
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Irish   Gleason  . This surname is concentrated in IL and PA.

variants.name: Gleeson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donal, Siobhan, Brendan, Conor.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Gleason was born about 1636, in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Thomas Gleason. She died on 8 July 1703, in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68.

it.lifeSummary: Sarah Gleason è nata il circa 1636 nel Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Thomas Gleason. Morì il 8 luglio 1703, nel Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Gleasonは約1636年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスルグラブで生まれた。彼女はThomas Gleasonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1703年7月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスフラミンガムで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Gleason(은)는 대략 1636년 영국 노르섬프토실르 설그레이브에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Thomas Gleason(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1703년 7월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sarah Gleason nasceu aproximadamente 1636, em Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Thomas Gleason. Ela faleceu em 8 de julho de 1703, em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Gleason родилась около 1636 г. в местности сулграв, нортамптоншир, Англия. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Thomas Gleason. Она умерла 8 июля 1703 г. в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет.
